name: Deviled Walleye Fillets
recipeIngredient: 1 pinch cayenne or dash of Tabasco
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the onion and green pepper in butter until soft.
2. Add mustard, soy sauce, cayenne, and lemon juice to the sauteed vegetables.
3. Stir in bread crumbs and cheese.
4. Season the fillets with salt and pepper.
5. Lay fillets on foil broiler liner, about 4 inches from heat.
6. Broil for 5 minutes.
7. Turn fish over and cover evenly with the bread-vegetable-cheese mixture.
8. Broil another 6-8 minutes. Serve.
